segment.source: A two-column feature section: heading, subheadline, and collapsible feature rows (title plus rich-text content, first item open, one open at a time) beside a single supporting image. Use it for: feature lists with expandable detail paragraphs, capability overviews sharing one product visual, 'what's included' sections. Prefer 'Tabbed Feature Section' when each feature has its own image; use 'FAQ Accordion' for question–answer content.
